title: eysenhardtia subcoriacea
intro: Eysenhardtia subcoriacea, also known as the desert coral or coral bean, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including the potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Eysenhardtia subcoriacea can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, and teas, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
